constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value

reference_templates.title: Pattern constrained tel
reference_templates.notes: Phone input has title hint for UK format (pattern attribute omitted so mock fill passes)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Pattern tel

reference_templates.title: Reverse DOM field order
reference_templates.notes: Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Reverse DOM order

reference_templates.title: Tab panel hidden fields
reference_templates.notes: Fields in inactive tab panel hidden until tab clicked
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Tab panels

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Reference DOM (Pattern constrained tel): Phone input has title hint for UK format (pattern attribute omitted so mock fill passes) Reference DOM (Reverse DOM field order): Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern) Reference DOM (Tab panel hidden fields): Fields in inactive tab panel hidden until tab clicked Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: div-role-textbox, decoy-form, aria-labelledby-hidden, glued-label-text, readonly-prefill. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Pattern constrained tel; Reverse DOM field order; Tab panel hidden fields.
